subject: Online check-in here

Hello Test Passenger
 
Online check-in
Online check-in for your flight from Estocolmo / to Lisboa is now open.
 
 
Flight details
 
Thursday, February 1, 2024
14:20
ARN
17:45

TP 781
 
TP 781 - (ARN) Estocolmo /, to (LIS) Lisboa
 

Baggage allowance:

Before traveling, please check the hand and hold baggage allowances permitted by TAP, according to your ticket and destination.
In case of carrying excess baggage, you can add an extra bag to your reservTESTRF through Manage your booking. If you choose to go to the boarding gate with the extra bag, a fee will be applied and can only be paid by credit/debit card.
On busy flights, it may be necessary to place your hand baggage in the hold (free of charge). In these situations, your baggage will be requested at the boarding gate and delivered at your destination, on the Arrivals baggage belt.
 
Check-in
 
For further information about all check-in possibilities, please go to flytap.com.
 
Wherever you go, TAP goes with you
This is an automatic message. Please do not reply to this email.


If you want to contact us, use our communication channels.
